purpose: Approval gate for revised Sun and Moon tiger art direction before bulk scene regeneration.
instruction: Review the seven generated approval anchors first. Do not mark all 32 Sun and Moon scenes as reviewed/final until the antagonist tiger design, child designs, cover mood, and scene tension are externally approved.
approvalCriteria: Tiger feels cunning, hungry, watchful, mature, and dangerous through posture, eyes, shadow, and framing.
Tension comes from eyes, posture, shadows, framing, and lighting.
No blood, gore, injury, exposed teeth emphasis, horror anatomy, jump scare, or graphic punishment.
Premium Korean watercolor/gouache/ink style with hanji texture is preserved.
Children remain protected by framing and never look traumatized.
The tiger design can stay consistent across all 32 scenes.

anchors.goal: Establish the first approved tiger face, eyes, silhouette, fur palette, and watchful forest presence.
Approve the tiger pretending restraint near the mother while still feeling hungry and calculating.
anchors.notes: The seven-image approval set generated this pass covers app hero, cover, tiger sheet, child sheet, forest, house/night, and chase/tension. This legacy anchor remains for later if the reviewer requests more tiger phases.

anchors.goal: Approve the disguised-at-the-door silhouette, eye slit, shadow, and child-safe suspense level.
Approve pursuit posture and danger level at the persimmon tree while keeping safe distance.
Approve defeated/resolved tiger treatment without graphic punishment, injury, or silly plush comedy.
anchors.notes: The seven-image approval set generated this pass covers app hero, cover, tiger sheet, child sheet, forest, house/night, and chase/tension. This legacy anchor remains for later if the reviewer requests more tiger phases.

reviewNotes: Seven approval anchors passed Codex visual QA for draft art direction: tiger is cunning/watchful rather than plush; no gore/horror; Korean picture-book mood is strong. Human creative/cultural review still required before final production.
